title: thymus atlanticus subsp. atlanticus
intro: Thymus atlanticus subsp. atlanticus, also known as Atlantic thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus atlanticus plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Atlantic thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Atlantic thyme include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments or used as a natural remedy for promoting overall well-being.
